creator: rooneg@electricjellyfish.net
text:
new port: diffutils.  this is a port for the GNU diffutils.  not that 
	i actually have any problem with our version of diff, but the 
	subversion project requires GNU diff and patch because of some subtle 
	differences between ours and theirs.  we have a port for GNU patch, 
	this gives us diff.

	if i have time, a port for subversion that makes use of this will 
	follow.

Fix: 

fetch http://electricjellyfish.net/diffutils-port.tar.gz and stick it 
	in ports/textproc.  note that this is the first time i've put a port 
	together myself, so someone should probably check it over pretty 
	closely.  i pretty much copied everything from /ports/devel/patch, but 
	it's reasonably likely that i screwed something up.
How-To-Repeat: 	try to install subversion w/o it ;-)
